notebook_pro macOS arm64 package

Contents:
- notebook_pro
- run_notebook_pro.command

Run options:
1. Double-click run_notebook_pro.command
2. Or open Terminal in this folder and run:
   ./notebook_pro

If macOS warns that the file cannot be opened:
1. Right-click the file and choose Open
2. Or run:
   xattr -d com.apple.quarantine ./notebook_pro
   xattr -d com.apple.quarantine ./run_notebook_pro.command
